Club ranking uses golfers created in 2022, 2023, and 2024. Each cohort retention rate is active today divided by golfers created in that cohort year. Default sort is Created 2022 Retention %, the most mature apples-to-apples benchmark. The uploaded source contains 57 clubs.

Recovery

Segmentation

Select a club once and every metric, chart, and breakdown below updates to that segment. Default view is All clubs.

Status Segmentation

Active, inactive, and archived GC golfer snapshot for the selected club segment.

Active GC Golfers

Monthly active golfer trend for the selected club segment.

Inactive GC Golfers

Monthly inactive golfer trend for the selected club segment.

Gender Breakdown

Active and inactive golfers by gender for the selected club segment.

Age Breakdown

Active and inactive golfers by age band for the selected club segment.
